nasb.text: The one who loves his brother abides in the Light and there is no cause for stumbling in him.

esv.text: Whoever loves his brother abides in the light, and in him there is no cause for stumbling.

cnv.text: 凡是愛弟兄的，就是住在光明中，在光明中他就不會跌倒。

ccb.text: 爱弟兄姊妹的人活在光明中，没有什么可以绊倒他。

csbs.text: 那爱自己弟兄的，就住在光里，而且在他里面没有什么绊脚的事；
